briefdescription.para: This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.

detaileddescription.para:
None.
None. This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes GPIO IP for Stream Switch selection and gets config parameters.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful or else XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function programs MIPI CSI SS with the required timing parameters.

detaileddescription.para:
None.
None. This function programs MIPI CSI SS with the required timing parameters.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful or else XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function sets colour depth value getting from MIPI CSI2 RX SS.
This function programs GPIO to '0' to select HDMI Stream path in AXI-Stream switch.

detaileddescription.para:
None.
None. This function programs GPIO to '0' to select HDMI Stream path in AXI-Stream switch.

briefdescription.para: This function writes, reads, and verifies the data to the IIC EEPROM.

detaileddescription.para: It does the write as a single page write, performs a buffered read.

None.
XST_SUCCESS if successful else XST_FAILURE.
None. This function writes, reads, and verifies the data to the IIC EEPROM.

briefdescription.para: This function sets send, receive and error handlers for IIC interrupts.
This function setup Camera sensor programming wrt resolution selected.
This function starts camera sensor to transmit captured video.
This function prints the video pipeline information.
This function disables MIPI CSI IP.

listitem.para:
This function disables MIPI CSI IP

briefdescription.para: This function stops VProc_SS scalar IP.
This function disables MIPI DSI SS.

listitem.para:
This function disables MIPI DSI SS.

briefdescription.para: This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.
This function initializes and configures VProcSS IP for scalar mode with the given input and output width and height values.

parameterdescription.para: is a flag value to initialize IP only once.

briefdescription.para: This function enables MIPI CSI IP.

listitem.para:
This function enables MIPI CSI IP

briefdescription.para: This header file contains the definitions for structures for video pipeline and extern declarations.
